vars.style: Editorial sports photography aesthetic. Cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, premium magazine cover feel. No text, no logos, no watermarks, no recognizable faces or jerseys of real clubs.

jobs.name: hero.jpg
jobs.prompt: A referee's hand raised mid-air over a football pitch in soft daylight, fingers extended in a countdown gesture. In the background, a goalkeeper in a generic neutral jersey holds a football near the penalty area. Grass texture sharp in foreground, stadium blurred behind. Symbolic of the new 2025/26 eight-second goalkeeper rule. {style}
